organization.name: Caesar Groep
organization.description: Caesar Groep is an IT services company supporting organizations in their digital transformation. With over 150 professionals across multiple business units, the group delivers solutions in areas such as cloud, software development, and digital workplace. Caesar Groep consists of several companies, including Cloud Republic, Garansys, Creates, LowQode, everywhereIM, Caesar Overheid, Caesar Experts, and Caesar ViaNova, and is the owner and maintainer of the open-source Yivi wallet app, widely used in the Netherlands.
